chunks.title: v2.11.35
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: traefik/traefik
Release: v2.11.35
Tag: v2.11.35; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-01-14T09:40:53Z; created_at: 2026-01-14T09:28:04Z
Release notes:
:warning: **Breaking change** :warning:
As explained in the comment left on the [CVE-2025-66490 fix](https://github.com/traefik/traefik/pull/12360#issuecomment-3729140469), this new hotfix version makes the behavior opt-in.
As a result, this release is breaking compared to the previous hotfix versions since [v2.11.32](https://github.com/traefik/traefik/releases/tag/v2.11.32), but it restores by default the behavior that existed before that hotfix.
Please, read the [migration guide](https://doc.traefik.io/traefik/v2.11/migration/v2/#encoded-characters-configuration-default-values) to enable the feature.
CVE fixed:
- [CVE-2026-22045](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-22045) (Advisory [GHSA-cwjm-3f7h-9hwqj](https://github.com/traefik/traefik/security/advisories/GHSA-cwjm-3f7h-9hwq))
**Bug fixes:**
- **[acme]** Add timeout to ACME-TLS/1 challenge handshake ([#12516](https://github.com/traefik/traefik/pull/12516) by [LBF38](https://github.com/LBF38))
- **[server]** Make encoded character options opt-in ([#12540](https://github.com/traefik/traefik/pull/12540) by [gndz07](https://github.com/gndz07))
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the traefik/traefik release v2.11.35, a breaking change makes the encoded character options opt-in, restoring the default behavior from before the hotfix in v2.11.32. The release fixes CVE-2026-22045 and includes bug fixes for ACME-TLS/1 challenge handshake timeout and server encoded character options.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the traefik/traefik release v3.6.7, a breaking change makes the encoded character options opt-in, restoring the default behavior from before the hotfix in v3.6.4. The release fixes CVE-2026-22045 and includes bug fixes for ACME (bump lego, renew options, log messages), Kubernetes ingress-nginx (use-regex annotation, TLS entrypoint attachment), Kubernetes ingress (empty defaultBackend panic), Kubernetes endpoints condition, webui X-Forwarded-Prefix validation, ACME-TLS/1 challenge handshake timeout, and server encoded character options. Documentation updates cover Docker swarm, ingress-nginx annotations, Kubernetes reference yml, code copy button, kubernetes.md typo, API & Dashboard security section, link description, and product comparison matrix.

Tag: v3.6.14; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-22T09:08:22Z; created_at: 2026-04-22T08:54:05Z
Release notes:
⚠️ **Breaking change** ⚠️
This release includes a bug fix (#12976) that makes Chain middleware CRDs honor the `allowCrossNamespace` configuration. Before this version, Chain middlewares could reference middlewares from other namespaces regardless of `allowCrossNamespace`. Starting with v3.6.14, when `allowCrossNamespace=false` (the default), a Chain referencing a middleware in a different namespace will be rejected and an error will be logged.
This was a bug fix and not a behavior we intended to support, but it may impact existing configurations that were relying on the previous (incorrect) behavior. Please review your Chain middleware references before upgrading. See the [migration guide](https://doc.traefik.io/traefik/v3.6/migrate/v3/#v3614) for details.
